title: Add battery-watchdog CLI + LaunchAgent
description: Proactive macOS watchdog: detects fast battery drain and sustained CPU hogs, sends osascript notifications. Triggered after a runaway PHP Language Server drained the laptop 100%->4% in ~1.5h. PHP script in bin/ following repo conventions, gated to no-op on Linux, with install/uninstall/test subcommands and a 3-min LaunchAgent (com.jt.battery-watchdog).
close_reason: Implemented battery-watchdog CLI + LaunchAgent; verified live check, sustained-hog detection, throttle, test notification, and install/load.

title: dirmap add: only show added entry instead of full map
description: When running 'dirmap add', the outputMap() call dumps the entire directory map. Should instead just confirm the single entry that was added.
close_reason: Fixed add and remove to show single entry confirmation instead of full map

title: Investigate how frontmatter is stripped during publish
description: Trace through PublishToSiteCommand to understand how stripFrontmatter() works and whether custom fields like 'references' are being removed from the source file or just ignored during publish.
close_reason: Found issue: buildFrontmatter() creates new frontmatter from scratch, ignoring existing $this->frontmatter which contains custom fields like references

title: Preserve non-standard frontmatter fields
description: Ensure custom frontmatter fields like 'references' are preserved. Determine if issue is: (1) fields being stripped from source file, (2) fields not being passed through to WordPress, or (3) fields being lost during content processing.
close_reason: Added mergeCustomFrontmatter() to FetchFromSiteCommand to preserve custom fields like references

title: Integrate taxonomy handling into jt-blog-publish
description: Modify BlogPublishCommand to use the new taxonomy parsing/validation/creation logic and include resolved category and tag IDs in the publish payload.

title: Create new taxonomy terms via WP REST API
description: For entries marked '(new)' like 'approval addiction (new)', create the term via WP REST API (wp/v2/categories or wp/v2/tags) and return the new ID.

title: Parse frontmatter taxonomy entries with ID/new format
description: Parse category and post_tag frontmatter entries in format 'Name (ID)' or 'Name (new)'. Extract the name and ID/new indicator into a structured format.

title: Validate existing taxonomy term IDs match names
description: For entries with numeric IDs like 'Life (191)', fetch the term from WP API and verify the name matches. Throw exception if ID exists but name doesn't match.

title: dirmap: migrate help docs to helpyHelperton infrastructure
description: dirmap has hand-rolled help output instead of using the standard helpyHelperton pattern from CLI helpers. Migrating would give consistent help formatting, --help flag support, and subcommand docs for free.
close_reason: Migrated to helpyHelperton with setup(), setupDefaultCommand(), and per-subcommand help
